steps.title: Use the breeding clue
steps.content: Moreau's team says differences in sonic communication could build until fish from different locations can no longer interbreed. That points to possible divergence over time.

steps.title: Reject stronger claims
steps.content: A and C add claims about sound use or sound types that the passage does not support. D wrongly says the fish are already genetically distinct enough to be separate species. The answer is B.
